cells: _after_
_I'll call you **after** we **solve** the problem._
cells_ru: _Я позвоню вам **после того, как** мы **решим** проблему._

cells: _as soon as_
_I'll call you **as soon as** we **solve** the problem._
cells_uz: _as soon as_ (... cuanto)... hatto, bilan birga

cells: _before_
_It'll be a few days **before** we **find** the solution._
_until / till_
_I won't call you **until** we **find** the solution._
cells_ru: _Я не позвоню вам, **пока** мы не **найдём** решение._

cells: _when_
_It'll be great **when** we **find** the solution._
_while_
_I'll be in the office **while** I **deal** with this problem._
cells_ru: _Я буду в офисе, **пока** занимаюсь этой проблемой._

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
Bu vaqt so'zlari va iboralarini gap boshiga ham qo'yishimiz mumkin.
✓ _**As soon as** we solve the problem, I'll call you._
tip.translation_ru:
Мы также можем ставить эти временные слова и фразы в начало предложения.
✓ _**As soon as** we solve the problem, I'll call you._

cells: Although + subject + verb, subject + verb
**Although** _my homework was difficult, I finished it before bed._
cells_uz: **Although** _uy vazifam qiyin bo'lsa-da, men uxlashdan oldin uni tugatdim._
cells_ru: **Although** _домашнее задание было трудным, я закончил(а) его до сна._

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
_although_ so'zini gap o'rtasiga ham qo'yish mumkin.
✓ _I finished my homework before bed, **although** it was difficult._
tip.translation_ru:
Мы также можем ставить _although_ в середину предложения.
✓ _I finished my homework before bed, **although** it was difficult._

cells: In spite of / despite + -ing form, subject + verb
**In spite of revising** _for hours, I didn't do well in the test._
cells_uz: In spite of / despite + -ing shakl, ega + fe'l
**In spite of revising** _soatlab tayyorlanishimga qaramay, testda yaxshi natija ko'rsata olmadim._
cells_ru: In spite of / despite + форма -ing, подлежащее + глагол
**In spite of revising** _часами, я не справился(лась) с тестом._

cells: In spite of / despite + noun, subject + verb
**Despite my revision**, _I didn't do well in the test._
cells_uz: In spite of / despite + ot, ega + fe'l
**Despite my revision**, _tayyorlanganim bilan, testda yaxshi natija ko'rsata olmadim._
cells_ru: In spite of / despite + существительное, подлежащее + глагол
**Despite my revision**, _я не справился(лась) с тестом._

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
_in spite of_ va _despite_ so'zlarini gap o'rtasiga ham qo'yish mumkin.
✓ _I didn't do well in the test, **despite** revising for hours._
tip.translation_ru:
Мы также можем ставить _in spite of_ и _despite_ в середину предложения.
✓ _I didn't do well in the test, **despite** revising for hours._

cells: Subject + verb. However, subject + verb.
_We believed that we would find a solution. **However**, we were wrong._
cells_uz: _Biz yechim topamiz deb ishongan edik. **However**, biz yanglishgan edik._
cells_ru: _Мы верили, что найдём решение. **However**, мы ошиблись._

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
_however_ so'zini ikkinchi gapning oxiriga ham qo'yish mumkin.
✓ _We believed that we would find a solution. We were wrong, **however**._
tip.translation_ru:
Мы также можем ставить _however_ в конец второго предложения.
✓ _We believed that we would find a solution. We were wrong, **however**._

tip.label: Helpful hints
tip.translation:
_unless_ so'zi _if ... not_ yoki _except if_ ma'nosini anglatadi.
✓ _**Unless** you hurry up, we'll be late._ ( = _**If** you **don't** hurry up, we'll be late._)

Shartli gaplar haqida ko'proq ma'lumot olish uchun 28 va 29-mavzularga qarang.
tip.translation_ru:
_unless_ означает _if ... not_ или _except if_.
✓ _**Unless** you hurry up, we'll be late._ ( = _**If** you **don't** hurry up, we'll be late._)

Для получения дополнительной информации об условных предложениях смотрите Разделы 28 и 29.
